findings.summary: Repo-relative path contract is violated by cwd-dependent path references.
findings.recommended_fix: Use consistent repo-root-relative paths (workspace-tester/...) or explicitly redefine and scope cwd-relative paths.

findings.summary: Wildcard path reference is not explicit/resolvable for contract validation.
evidence: Reference uses src/tester-flow/run_*.sh rather than explicit concrete scripts.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace wildcard with explicit script paths or reference the canonical explicit list only.

required_fixes: Normalize contract paths to one explicit resolution policy (prefer repo-root-relative workspace-tester/... paths).
Replace wildcard run_*.sh reference with explicit script path list.
